Qmee – Paid Online Surveys - Shop to earn real cash rewards - Qmee.com

QMee is another great survey app! I love that you can cash out at any dollar amount, but it does have to go through PayPal or Venmo. In my opinion though it's worth it. They also offer other deals like cashback on shopping, downloadable games that you can earn cashback with. It's really great!&nbsp;<br><br>Sign up through this link on a computer browser.

Brandclub - Get rewarded to shop

Brand Club is another one I highly recommend! For starters, you can cash out at $10 and you get $12 for immediately signing up through my link! So that means by signing up with this app you can cash out at $12 right off the start. Other things you can do is affiliate marketing on items, they offer cash back for buying everyday things and so much more! I'd definitely check it out!

Amazon Associates

Anyone can become an affiliate with Amazon! You'll get your own links for any Amazon product you want to promote, get orders through your links to gain commission. After you have 3 qualifying sales, Amazon unlocks Promo Codes for you to share with your followers to help get them deals on products, and you get paid for it! You can also earn with new subscription sign ups for Prime and others!

Smile Curation

18

Douro Valley Small-Group Tour with Wine Tasting, Lunch and Optional Cruise

My husband and I visited Douro Valley during the spring. It was a little over an hour drive from Porto. It was an absolutely breathtaking experience. When you compare it to the famous Napa Valley in California, Douro Valley is huge! The landscape is totally different. Opting for the small group option our guide Joao picked us up directly from the hotel and our group had just 6 guests. One of the highlights of the trip was learning about port wine, a topic I had very little knowledge of prior to my visit. The guides from two different wineries shared fascinating insights into the history and production of this renowned beverage. The cruise along the Douro River was relaxing and the scenery was beautiful. While the trip was long, Douro Valley should unquestionably be on your travel list. If you don't have the time to go to Douro Valley, you can still sample the region's renowned port wine with a tour of the cellars in Vila Nova de Gaia, just across the river from the Ribeira district in Porto

Casario in Porto

&nbsp;restuaRomantic restaurant overlooking the river with great view. The waiter was friendly and attentive. It's a popular resturant so make reservation far in advance if you can. The food was delicious and the 5 course menu was a reasonable 48 euro and wine pairing was 20 something euro. Request window seat but not to sit outisde. The street musicians are quite loud and may not be your taste of music. Allow extra time to find the restsurant as well, you have to walk up some stairs. It was not right on the riverwalk. It was a very nice experience overall.

Mouzinho da Silveira Unique Apartments, by Oporto Collection, Porto, Portugal

We stayed at this apartment hotel. it's in the best location. It is smack in the middle of the historic center of Porto. &nbsp;Very close to Ribeira district and famous Sao Bento station. We got up early and walked to the station and took all the pictures we wanted before the crowds. 😊The apartment was very clean and the bed was comfortable.

See all 18 recs

View List
Portugal Must do Tours and Restaurants- Porto and Lisbon

I visited Portugal in May, and it's a charming place. &nbsp;I'd recommend going in April, May, September, or October for milder weather and fewer crowds. Portugal is budget-friendly; we used Uber everywhere in Porto and Lisbon, which was cheaper than taking taxis. Some taxis only take cash, so be sure to check with the driver before getting in. We took the comfortable train ride from Porto to Lisbon and scored discounts by buying tickets in advance. Inform your bank about your travel plans; I did not do it and could only withdraw cash in Lisbon but not Porto. Many attractions are crowded, so consider tour options to skip the lines if time is important for you. Bring comfortable shoes!! Lots of walking on cobblestone streets and Lisbon is hilly.

Cornelia Van Zyl

Kristen Alvidrez

18

All-Day Guided Zipline Tour with Train Ride and Lunch in Durango

There’s no better way to experience Durango than this tour, combining the city’s history, nature, and culinary scene. You and your crew will tackle the largest zipline course in the world, break for lunch up in the trees’ canopy, and hop on an ecology tour. Last but not least, Durango is home to a narrow-gauge railroad, and you’ll ride a first-class train car to and from your adventure. Tackle 27 ziplines spanning 56 to 1400 feet Enjoy a four-course gourmet lunch overlooking the Animas River Learn about the old-growth forest on a guided tour Hop on the red Tall Timber train car from the downtown Durango train station Read more about All-Day Guided Zipline Tour with Train Ride and Lunch in Durango

Manitou Incline

Manitou Incline in Manitou Springs, Colorado. Highly Recommended Day Hike! Stairs straight up .88 of a Mile, 2,768 Steps and you gain about 2,000 Feet in Elevation. Known as the Stair Master from Hell! But such an Accomplishment 👏 🙌 It's like a StairMaster, but outside Referred to by locals as simply ‘the Incline’, this popular but strenuous hike is not for the faint of heart. After climbing the 2,000 vertical feet, you’ll finally reach the summit. At the top, the Incline Trail connects to Barr Trail, which offers a steep but scenic 3-mile path back down to the base.&nbsp;<br>The Bailout: A false summit ⅔ of the way to the top is the closest some come to tackling the Incline. Here, the Incline Trail meets up with Barr Trail for the first time and offers exhausted hikers a reprieve. If you think you need to bail, we won’t tell anyone. But if you can muster enough energy, you’re almost to the top! Difficulty level: Extreme (we promise we’re not kidding)&nbsp;<br>Total stairs: 2,744&nbsp;<br>Annual visitors: An estimated 70,000 annual visitors ranging from 7-70 years old.&nbsp;<br>Average time: Seasoned Incliners and Olympic athletes may summit in under 30 minutes, but most hikers complete the Incline in 1 hour or longer.&nbsp;<br>Length: About .88 mile / 1.4 km (plus nearly 3 miles / 4.8 km down Barr Trail) Elevation Gain: 2,020 ft / 615 m Base Elevation: 6,530 ft / 2012 m Summit Elevation: 8,550 ft / 2606 m Average Grade: 41% Steepest Grade: 68%

Winter Park Ute Trail, Colorado - 315 Reviews, Map

This Hike is within the Winter Park Resort in Colorado , Beautiful Views & only 2 Miles up , from there you could Hike back down or Ride the Gondola Down. This is my go to Morning Hike when in the area , it's so Relaxing

Heather Corbett

13

The King of Queens

I think I love this show so much because Doug reminds me of my husband. It's so relatable to married couples.

Paper Girls - Season 1

My husband and I binged watched this show in one day. It's the story of four paper girls from 1988 who accidently travel forward in time and meet their future selves. There's not much I love more than a good time travel story! I'm definitely going to look into getting the comic book that the series is based on so that I can see where the story would have went had it been given more seasons.

So Weird

This was the first paranormal show for kids I ever saw and I was hooked. It's about a girl named Fiona who travels the country with her brother and rock star mom. She finds something paranormal in every town she visits such as aliens, ghost, bigfoot and banshees. It was a show that took itself seriously and never talked down to kids. I wish it was available on DVD.

17

Ravens Playground

This is a great playground for kids who want to pretend to be a professional athlete or honestly not at all. It's a well produced playground that kids can pretend to go through a Ninja Warrior type obstacle course. Really fun!

Indian Delight

Hands down my favorite place. Period! It's a bit of a hole in the wall but the food is great. My favorite is the Chicken Tikka Masala.

Hoffman's Ice Cream & Deli

The sweetest most “hometown” ice cream place you ever did see. This place hasn't changed since I was a kid and for good reason. My favorite is the Mint Chocolate Chip!

jessica merjaneh

57

When Breath Becomes Air by Paul Kalanithi

It's a powerful memoir written by a neurosurgeon named Paul, who was diagnosed with terminal lung cancer at a young age. In this heartfelt and thought-provoking account, he takes us on a journey from being a healer of patients to becoming a patient himself. Through his eloquent writing, Paul reflects on the meaning of life, mortality, and the pursuit of purpose amidst facing death. This was one of the most captivating books I have ever read after I picked it up I could not put it down.

The Song of Achilles by Madeline Miller

This novel retells the Greek myth of Achilles and the Trojan War. Through the eyes of Patroclus, a young prince who becomes Achilles' closest companion and lover, the story unfolds with heart-wrenching emotion and rich storytelling. This book made me sob.

In Five Years: A Novel by Rebecca Serle

6 star read. Literally one of my favorite books ever written.The story follows Dannie Kohan, a meticulous planner, who has her life all figured out. But one night, after falling asleep, she wakes up in an entirely different life, five years into the future, with a different man by her side.

Aries The Cat Ambassador

13

The Avondale Brick Restuarant

Discover elegance meets casual charm at The Brick Restaurant, Jacksonville's go-to dining experience where both indoor and outdoor seating is on the menu, so your furry friend can join for dinner al fresco. From seared ahi tuna to wagyu burgers, there's something to delight every palate.

Oceanside Beach Bar & Grill

Experience the perfect blend of tradition and beach vibes at Oceanside Beach Bar & Grill in Flagler Beach. Delight in traditional Mediterranean cuisine served in a chic, beachfront setting with dog-friendly outdoor seating.

Salt Life Food Shack

Salt Life at Jacksonville Beach's dog-friendly hotspot, Salt Life Food Shack, just a short stroll from the beach. Revel in the coastal vibes on their open-air patio while savoring mouthwatering surf and turf dishes – the perfect spot to chill with your pup by your side.
